_usage: Person template for a blog author (E-E-A-T signal). Emit on the author's bio page and reference it from every Article that author writes via the matching @id (article.template.json -> author.@id). The Author schema is one of the strongest E-E-A-T signals for AI platforms, so populate `sameAs` (LinkedIn, X, GitHub, Google Scholar/ORCID where applicable), `jobTitle`, `worksFor`, and `knowsAbout` for each real author. EVERY field marked TODO must be filled with a real, verifiable person — do NOT invent an author, credentials, or profiles (Oraclous is pre/early and the team/founder block is itself still TODO per about.md). If a post has no named human author yet, attribute it to the Organization instead of fabricating a Person. `worksFor` references the Organization via @id.
name: TODO — author full name
description: TODO — one-sentence bio establishing relevant expertise (agentic AI, access control, data sovereignty, platform engineering).
_sameAs_todo: Replace every TODO with a real, verified profile URL before publishing. Remove any sameAs entry the author does not actually have rather than leaving a dead link. Add alumniOf / award / Google Scholar / ORCID where they genuinely apply.
